---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new template, guide, tool feature, or improvement to the framework.
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**What problem does this solve?**
Describe the gap or limitation you have encountered while using the framework.

**Describe the solution you would like.**
A clear description of what you want to happen. If you are proposing a new template or guide, explain what phase of the ALIGN framework it would belong to and how it connects to existing materials.

**Alternatives you have considered.**
Have you tried working around the limitation in another way?

**Additional context.**
Any examples, references, or screenshots that help illustrate the request.
